metadata.description: Premium auto detailing in São Domingos de Rana. Ceramic coating, paint correction, interior deep cleaning, and full detailing — 166+ five-star reviews.

hero.tagline: Premium auto detailing in São Domingos de Rana. Ceramic coating, paint correction, and full interior restoration — your car deserves the best.

items.title: Exterior Wash
items.description: Complete exterior wash, decontamination, wheel cleaning, and hand dry — your car gleaming from every angle.

items.title: Interior Detail
items.description: Deep vacuum, dashboard treatment, fabric and leather conditioning, and full sanitization — a spotless cabin.

items.title: Paint Correction
items.description: Machine polishing to remove swirl marks, scratches, and oxidation — restoring your paint to a mirror finish.

items.title: Ceramic Coating
items.description: Professional-grade ceramic coating for long-term paint protection, hydrophobic finish, and showroom shine that lasts years.

items.title: Full Detail
items.description: The complete transformation — exterior wash, interior deep clean, paint correction, and finishing touches. Inside and out.

items.title: Upholstery Cleaning
items.description: Deep extraction cleaning for seats, carpets, and headliner. Pet hair removal, stain treatment, and deodorizing.

pricing.subtitle: Choose the level of care your car deserves.
pricing.disclaimer: Prices are indicative. Final cost depends on vehicle size and condition.

about.body:
Bruno founded M M Detalhe Automóvel with one mission: to transform every vehicle that comes through his hands. Based in São Domingos de Rana, he's built a reputation for meticulous attention to detail that turns even the most neglected cars into showroom pieces.

With over 8 years of experience and a perfect 5-star rating across 166+ Google reviews, Bruno and his team offer pickup and delivery service, professional-grade products, and the kind of craftsmanship that keeps customers coming back. The before-and-after transformations on Instagram speak for themselves.

images.alt: Ceramic coating water beading on hood
Car ready for delivery after full detail

items.quote: Spectacular service with incredible attention to detail! The team is extremely friendly and showed flawless professionalism. On top of the quality, they offer very competitive prices. Highly recommend!
items.name: Victor Arefiev

items.quote: Excellent service and excellent customer care. A 20-year-old car came out looking brand new. Brilliant interior — they managed to remove the rubber coating from the dashboard — fully sanitized and smelling great, including upholstery. Paint and roof with special treatment. Highly recommend!
items.name: Flor Paredes

items.quote: Bruno is super friendly and my car looks brand new — you'd never guess I have a dog that constantly fills it with hair! Highly recommend.
items.name: Paulo Neto

items.quote: Used them for a deep interior clean and exterior polish on a Strakar pickup that was extremely dirty from years of farm work. In 2 days it was impeccable, shining inside and out. Excellent value for money compared to others I researched. Highly recommend!
items.name: Luis Sequeira

items.quote: I've used this company more than once. Every time I was extremely satisfied. Outstanding and differentiated service, excellent professionals. Absolutely recommend.
items.name: Ruth Barbosa

items.quote: Flawless work! I recommended them to a family member through their ad and it turned out amazing. Super professional! No regrets with the recommendation and I'll be using their services again.
items.name: Tiago Soares Lopes

items.quote: They picked up and delivered the car! I work as a petsitter and my car was covered in hair — to the point you couldn't see the floor — and it was returned practically hair-free. Absolutely recommend!
items.name: Patricia Martins

items.quote: Excellent service! 5-star customer care and impeccable cleaning. The car arrived in a very rough state and the professionals left it spotless. They've won a regular customer.
items.name: Pedro Teixeira

googleReviews.subtitle: Your review helps other car owners find a detailer they can trust — and it means the world to our team.

items.question: Do you offer pickup and delivery?
items.answer: Yes! We pick up your car and return it once the detailing is complete. It's one of our most popular features — no need to rearrange your schedule.

items.question: What areas do you serve?
items.answer: We're based in São Domingos de Rana and serve the greater Cascais, Oeiras, and Lisbon western corridor. Contact us to check if we cover your area.

items.question: How long does a full detail take?
items.answer: A basic wash takes a few hours. A premium detail is typically same-day. Full details with paint correction or ceramic coating can take 1-2 days depending on the vehicle's condition.

items.question: Can you remove pet hair from my car?
items.answer: Absolutely. We specialize in deep extraction cleaning that removes pet hair, dander, and odors. Many of our happiest customers are pet owners — check our reviews!

items.question: How long does ceramic coating last?
items.answer: Our professional-grade ceramic coating provides 2+ years of protection with a hydrophobic finish that repels water, dirt, and UV damage. Proper maintenance extends its life even further.

items.question: Do I need to book in advance?
items.answer: We recommend booking ahead, especially for premium services and ceramic coating. For basic washes, we can often fit you in on shorter notice. Call or WhatsApp us to check availability.

contact.body: Ready to transform your car? Get a quote, book a service, or just ask us anything — we're always happy to help.
